title: Boopcraft [Purple Sheep Edition]
body:
# Boopcraft [Purple Sheep Edition] 
A modpack designed by **EepinGiraffe** for **[itsDeadlyBoop](https://www.twitch.tv/itsDeadlyBoop)** and her community. The modpack aims to provide a simple cozy experience full of magic, dinosaurs, and general goofability. Designed with mods to enhance the aesthetics and vibe of base minecraft while also being friendly to anyone who has never played modded minecraft before.

If you're looking to play in your own world on the same modpack as her, this is for you!
The seed she is currently on is: 8229382270178303449
